summary: Technical Program/Project Manager with 6+ years of experience delivering IT infrastructure, InfoSec, M&A, and construction projects across enterprise environments. Skilled in Agile and Waterfall methodologies, vendor and stakeholder management, and leading cross-functional teams. Proven track record of improving efficiency, driving digital transformation, and ensuring timely, high-quality project delivery.

experience.title: Technical Program & Project Manager
highlights: Led over 11 dealership acquisition projects, coordinating IT integration and minimizing operational downtime.
Managed hardware and software refresh programs with budgets exceeding $5M+, improving infrastructure efficiency.
Oversaw InfoSec and GRC initiatives, enhancing network security and compliance standards.
Directed IT construction projects from planning to delivery, including vendor management, procurement, and scheduling.
Drove a 40% increase in project delivery efficiency by implementing a centralized enterprise PM system and onboarding 30+ managers.
Created automated executive-level dashboards for critical reporting and organizational transparency.
Developed and managed project budgets up to $2M while maintaining expenses within a 5% variance.
Orchestrated complex software handoffs across vendors, engineering teams, and internal customers, improving user adoption through training and communication.

experience.title: IT Project & Quality Manager
highlights: Delivered IT infrastructure, networking, and cloud migration projects for HQ, branch, and airport offices nationwide.
Introduced Agile methodology across teams, leading daily standups and biweekly sprints to streamline delivery cycles.
Authored PM documentation including charters, schedules, budgets, risk logs, and SOPs to standardize processes.
Built Power BI and SQL dashboards to report KPIs and project health to directors and C-level executives.
Improved vendor management and reduced costs through performance analysis and contract optimization.

experience.title: Project Coordinator
highlights: Supported construction and commissioning of critical infrastructure systems in data center facilities.
Coordinated with engineering and operations teams on the installation of air handling units.

education.institution: Harrisburg University of Science and Technology

certifications: Power BI Desktop Certification — Coursera Project Network

additional.work_authorization: Eligible to work in the U.S.
